facts.claim: Set sail on the Fun Italian Style Carnival Firenze from Long Beach and Miami. Enjoy fun experiences on board, delicious food, and beautiful decor.
Carnival Firenze is a Vista-class cruise ship operated by Carnival Cruise Line.

Originally debuting as Costa Firenze for sister brand Costa Cruises, she was initially commissioned for the Chinese market but was never deployed to Asia following the impact of the COVID-19 pandemic on cruise travel in China.
